winter_homecoming.name: winter_homecoming
winter_homecoming.prompt: Acoustic guitar and a warm, mellow cello blending together into a relaxing, gentle winter melody. Subtle chime accents evoke the feeling of a quiet holiday evening. No lyrics, instrumental only. This prompt has NOTHING to do with the other prompts; do not use them for context.

veridge_guild_theme.prompt: An upbeat, orchestral piece featuring driving strings and triumphant brass. It captures the energy of a bustling hub of heroes and workers, filled with a sense of purpose and grandeur. Instrumental only. This prompt has NOTHING to do with the other prompts; do not use them for context.

high_commons_bustle.name: high_commons_bustle
high_commons_bustle.prompt: A lively, upbeat tempo with mandolins and light percussion. It captures the frantic but cheerful energy of a morning market in a prosperous city. Instrumental only. This prompt has NOTHING to do with the other prompts; do not use them for context.
